---
title: "Server"
description-meta: "openme server reference — configuration, firewall setup and hardening, and systemd service management."
keywords: [openme server, SPA server Linux, openme daemon, openme systemd, openme firewall]
---

This section covers everything you need to run and maintain the openme server
daemon in production.

| Page | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [Configuration](configuration.qmd) | Full YAML reference for `/etc/openme/config.yaml` |
| [Firewall](firewall.qmd) | nftables / iptables backends; hardening a default-deny policy |
| [Service](service.qmd) | systemd unit, session monitoring, verify |

**New to openme?** Start with [Getting Started](../getting-started/index.qmd)
to install, initialise, and send your first knock.
